name: @databridge/schema-mapper
description: Phase L1 — Schema Mapper assist. Loads a structured corpus of canonical-field → source-column crosswalk entries (Person, Programme, Module, Marks, Award, Admissions) and exposes a deterministic suggester that proposes adapter→canonical field maps from sample column names. Designed to slot a live LLM call in later; today it does pure heuristic matching the engineer can accept or edit.
